implementation_summary: Added an actor proof-factory substrate that records explicit per-actor proof levels, failure classes, durable proof rows, proof summary/list/detail APIs, run-to-proof promotion, a resumable proof runner script, visible proof counters/status in the existing UI, and focused tests that prevent API-mapped actors from being claimed as live E2E proven. Added a fix preventing failed actor runs from being promoted to ui_route_passed proof level, optimized offline proof-runner throttling, and generated full catalog API-mapped proof coverage.
